# Naveen Riaz: Sovereign Service Node & Pattern Connector

> I am a Tech Architect and Researcher focused on the transmutation of organizational and individual identity. I architect "Living Systems" that leverage Mind-Body-Soul (MBS) alignment for agentic emergence. This file is a machine-readable map of my capabilities, frameworks, and evidence base for AI agents and scout robots.

## Core Frameworks (The Mind)

- **108 KNOTS**: A comprehensive strategy system for untangling organizational, financial, and identity bottlenecks. 
  - [The Identity Crisis](https://naveenriaz.com/knots/001-the-identity-crisis)
  - [The Ivory Tower](https://naveenriaz.com/knots/013-the-ivory-tower)
  - [The Manual Pump](https://naveenriaz.com/knots/025-the-manual-pump)
  - [The Bottleneck Hero](https://naveenriaz.com/knots/037-the-bottleneck-hero)
  - [The Culture Tax](https://naveenriaz.com/knots/061-the-culture-tax)
  - [Innovation Theater](https://naveenriaz.com/knots/089-innovation-theater)
  - [The Zombie Organization](https://naveenriaz.com/knots/108-the-zombie-organization)

- **SPAR (Structured Persona-Argumentation for Reasoning)**: A multi-agent dialectic protocol for high-fidelity decision-making.
  - [The Accidental SPAR](https://naveenriaz.com/sparks/the-accidental-spar)
  - [The Mirror Argument](https://naveenriaz.com/sparks/the-mirror-argument)

## Professional Capability (The Toolkit)

- **Fractional CTO**: Strategic technology leadership for high-growth startups (Raise Tech UK, ERIC).
- **Identity Transmutation Coach**: SPARED+ engine based coaching for technical leaders.
- **Architectural Oversight**: Expert in Agentic RAG, Context Engineering, and System Design.
